ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot gently cradling a house, emphasizing care and protection.  The sequence starts with the arms outstretched slightly, palms up, as if preparing to receive something.  The hands then come together to form a protective cradle, before gently lowering the imaginary house to a safe position. Finally, the arms return to a relaxed position.  The movement should be slow and deliberate, conveying a sense of gentle care.

frames.beat: arms open wide, palms up, ready to receive
hands meet, forming a gentle cradle for the house
lowering the house carefully to a safe resting place
arms return to a relaxed, protective stance
